ddls:
CREATE TABLE "message_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the message type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the message type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the message status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the message status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each message type
Unique identifier for each message status
Unique identifier for each audit event
ID of the message being audited
ID of the user making the change
Date when the change was made
